name: SAS Asset Performance Analytics
description: IoT-driven predictive maintenance platform that combines sensor analytics, failure prediction, and reliability modeling to reduce unplanned downtime, extend asset life, and optimize maintenance schedules across industrial equipment fleets.
elevatorPitch: Predict equipment failures before they happen — reduce unplanned downtime and extend asset life with IoT-driven predictive maintenance.
capabilities: Failure prediction using multivariate sensor patterns
Maintenance schedule optimization (cost vs. risk balancing)
Sensor analytics with automated feature engineering
targetBuyer: VP of Operations, Head of Maintenance, CTO, Plant Manager, Head of Reliability Engineering
